ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of climate model (e.g., GCM, RCM) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution that developed the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model that generated the scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the scenario */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the scenario */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario that generated the projection */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "value" REAL /* Projected value (e.g., temperature increase) */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Climate variable being projected (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the projected value */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drought_likelihood" (
  "drought_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drought likelihood projection */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model that generated the projection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the projection was made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "likelihood" REAL /* Projected likelihood of drought (e.g., 0.32039) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the drought likelihood projection */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the drought */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drought_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drought_likelihood_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drought_likelihood_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical analysis */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the projection that was analyzed */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis (e.g., mean, median) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistical analysis */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the statistical analysis was performed */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES projections ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model that generated the data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, organization) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was exported */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
